chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Divorce of an Absent Person

text: 4768 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "اَلْغَائِبُ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَنْ يُطَلِّقَ اِمْرَأَتَهُ تَرَكَهَا شَهْراً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4768 - Muḥammad ibn Abi Ḥamzah narrated from Isḥaq ibn ʿAmmar who reported from Abu Abdullah (as) that he said:
"If an absent man wants to divorce his wife, he should leave her for one month."
